testCases.scenario: W1: insertFileChip(path) 创建结构化 file chip DOM
testCases.steps: 调 insertFileChip('src/foo.ts')，断言创建的 .mention-file chip：dataset.chipType==='file', dataset.chipPath==='src/foo.ts', 含 .chip-label + .chip-x + 后续 ZWSP spacer 文本节点

expected.text: chip DOM: class=mention-chip mention-file, contenteditable=false, dataset.chipType=file, dataset.chipPath=src/foo.ts, 含 chip-label + chip-x, 后跟 \u200B spacer

testCases.scenario: W1: insertFileChip(path, [10,20]) 设行范围 dataset + label 格式
testCases.steps: 调 insertFileChip('src/foo.ts', [10,20])，断言 dataset.chipLineStart==='10', dataset.chipLineEnd==='20', .chip-label.textContent 含 'src/foo.ts:L10-L20'

expected.text: dataset.chipLineStart=10, chipLineEnd=20, chip-label 显示 src/foo.ts:L10-L20

testCases.scenario: W1: getSegmentsFromEl 解析 .mention-file 产出 file segment 无文本污染
testCases.steps: 构造含 .mention-file（dataset.chipPath=foo.ts）的 DOM，调 getSegmentsFromEl，断言产出 [{type:'file',path:'foo.ts'}]，.chip-label/.chip-x 文本不泄漏

testCases.scenario: W1: @mention 仍走 insertMentionChip 行为不变
testCases.steps: 调 insertMentionChip('@','user')，断言创建 .mention-chip.mention-at（非 mention-file），textContent='@user'，不设 file dataset

expected.text: chip class=mention-chip mention-at, textContent=@user, 无 chipPath dataset

testCases.scenario: W2: composer-injection store pendingInjection 单值覆盖 + clear
testCases.steps: requestInjection(target=current,path=a.ts,sessionId=s1) 后再 requestInjection(target=current,path=b.ts,sessionId=s1)，断言 pendingInjection.path===b.ts（覆盖）；clearInjection() 后 null

expected.text: 覆盖后 path=b.ts；clear 后 null

testCases.scenario: W2: useComposerInjection target=current 按 sessionId 匹配消费
testCases.steps: mount Composer(sessionId=s1)，requestInjection(target=current,path=foo.ts,sessionId=s1)，flushPromises，断言 insertFileChip spy 调一次 foo.ts，pendingInjection 清空

testCases.scenario: W2: target=current sessionId 不匹配不消费不误清
testCases.steps: mount Composer(sessionId=s1)，requestInjection(target=current,path=foo.ts,sessionId=s2)，flushPromises，断言 insertFileChip 未调用，pendingInjection 仍在

testCases.scenario: W2: target=new 仅 landing composer(variant=landing)消费
testCases.steps: mount Composer(variant=landing)，requestInjection(target=new,path=foo.ts)，flushPromises，断言 landing composer insertFileChip 调一次

testCases.scenario: W2: target=new 不被 session composer(variant=panel)消费
testCases.steps: mount Composer(variant=panel,sessionId=s1)，requestInjection(target=new,path=foo.ts)，flushPromises，断言 session composer insertFileChip 未调用

testCases.scenario: W3: DetailPane header 按钮注入当前文件 file chip
testCases.steps: mount DetailPane(state.path=src/foo.ts)，找 header 加入引用按钮 testid=detail-inject-file，click，断言 pendingInjection.path===src/foo.ts target===current

testCases.scenario: W3: DiffView 行号点击注入单行 file chip
testCases.steps: mount DiffView(patch 含已知行,path=src/foo.ts)，click 行号 10，断言 emit line-inject path=src/foo.ts lineNo=10

testCases.scenario: W3: GitPanel 文件名注入按钮注入 path-only file chip
testCases.steps: mount GitPanel(含文件 src/foo.ts)，找注入按钮 testid=git-inject-file，click，断言 pendingInjection.path===src/foo.ts target===current 无 lineStart

testCases.scenario: W4: DetailPane 选区 bubble 注入行范围 file chip 不含文本
testCases.steps: mount DetailPane(diff模式,state.path=src/foo.ts)，模拟选中文本跨行10-12，mouseup，断言 bubble 显出；click引用当前对话，断言 pendingInjection.path===src/foo.ts lineStart=10 lineEnd=12 target=current 无 text

expected.text: bubble 显出；pendingInjection path=src/foo.ts lineStart=10 lineEnd=12 target=current 无 text

testCases.scenario: W5: Turn.vue 渲染 file segment badge
testCases.steps: mount Turn(user.content=[{type:file,path:src/foo.ts,lineRange:[10,20]}])，断言 DOM 含 file badge testid=msg-file-badge，文本含 foo.ts 和 L10-L20，title 含全路径

expected.text: DOM 含 file badge，显示 foo.ts:L10-L20，title 含 src/foo.ts

testCases.scenario: W1+W2 端到端：store 写入 → Composer 真实消费 → DOM 出现真实 file chip
testCases.steps: mount 真实 Composer（不 mock ComposerInput），requestInjection(target=current,path=src/foo.ts,sessionId=s1) 到 composerInjectionStore，flushPromises，断言 contenteditable DOM 内真实出现 .mention-file chip（dataset.chipPath=src/foo.ts），非 spy 调用断言而是真实 DOM 节点

expected.text: contenteditable 内含 .mention-file chip，dataset.chipPath=src/foo.ts，是真实 DOM 节点非 mock

testCases.scenario: W1 端到端：真实 DOM file chip 经 getSegments 产出 file segment
testCases.steps: mount 真实 ComposerInput，调 insertFileChip(src/foo.ts,[10,20])（真实 DOM 操作），再调 getSegments()，断言返回 [{type:file,path:src/foo.ts,lineRange:[10,20]}]，验证 DOM→segment 真实链路（非 mock getSegmentsFromEl）

expected.text: getSegments 返回 [file segment path=src/foo.ts lineRange=[10,20]]，真实 DOM 链路

testCases.scenario: W2 端到端：target=new 真实路由 landing composer 消费
testCases.steps: mount 真实 Composer(variant=landing)，requestInjection(target=new,path=foo.ts)，flushPromises，断言 landing composer contenteditable 内真实出现 .mention-file chip（验证 variant 路由绕过 publicSessionId 坑点的真实行为）

expected.text: landing composer contenteditable 内含 .mention-file chip dataset.chipPath=foo.ts
